headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -7.2)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 28% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations lead in raw volume with 154 quotes and 114 at strong intensity, but Fears is flagged as dominant today with a score of -50.6 — the lowest point in the entire 151-day range.
• Fears hitting its historical floor suggests unusually quiet or suppressed fear sentiment, while Frustrations at 34.7 remains active but has pulled back notably from yesterday's 48.5.
• Optimism stays in negative territory at -23.1, though it is well above its 151-day low, pointing to a persistently subdued but not extreme mood.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
